title: celastrus racemosus
intro: Celastrus racemosus, also known as Jyotishmati or staff tree, is a woody climber native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Celastrus racemosus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and promoting overall well-being, as well as its potential to enhance immune function and protect against age-related diseases. Celastrus racemosus is commonly prepared as an herbal extract, capsule, or powder, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic formulations to promote health and longevity.
